decision.summary: No new action: the account is flat, but there is still no usable daily board and the weekly frontier remains too weak to justify a new entry.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and there are no open positions. Binance is neutral short-term, with BTC around 77383, shorts still dominant, and open interest flat, so there is no strong momentum confirmation in either direction. More importantly, the snapshot shows no active daily BTC price-hit candidates at all, so there is no same-day slot to evaluate yet. On the weekly side, the only visible frontier markets remain too weak and too far from the current price: 80k reach is only around 4.2% and 72k dip around 1.2%, both well outside the preferred range and not clean expressions of an immediate edge. The disciplined move is to wait for a fresher daily slate or a stronger weekly setup and take NO_ACTION.
